'''Spinax III''' was a [[Waterworld/Legends|waterworld]] in the [[Spinax system/Legends|Spinax system]] of the [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]]. It was viewed romantically by many in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]], as it had a famous tradition of leviathan-hunters: for [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]], hunters would take to Spinax's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] to hunt the planet's immense [[Crustacean/Legends|crustaceans]], creatures with minimal but malevolent intelligence and tough, flexible skeletons useful for a range of crafts. However, careless undersea [[Mining/Legends|mining]] polluted Spinax's seas, and the last leviathans died centuries before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
